creator: nwhitehorn@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks! One thing that I mentioned in the PR is that I buttonholed one 
of the Condor people. Apparently Condor is redistributable (OSG, Red 
Hat, and Debian do it, for instance) but only so long as you don't use 
UW's hosting. It might be nice to do this for FreeBSD.
-Nathan

On 10/04/13 08:54, Jason Bacon wrote:
> Will start testing and report back ASAP.
>
> Thanks,
>
>      JB
>
> On 10/04/13 08:20, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
>> Maintainer of sysutils/condor,
>>
>> Please note that PR ports/182635 has just been submitted.
>>
>> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>> and a committer will take care of it.
>>
>> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/182635
>>
